news.summary: Plano, Texas-based Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD), a tech and data-driven company providing inclusive financial solutions for underserved consumers, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.39 for Q3 2025. The dividend is scheduled for July 8, 2025, and will be given to common stockholders recorded as of the business day on J
news.headline: Upbound Group, Inc. declares $0.39 quarterly cash dividend for Q3 2025 to be paid on July 8th.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Zilliant, a prominent player in pricing lifecycle management, published insights from its report titled "2025 Pricing Technology Trends: Bridging the Gap Between Strategy and Execution". The study highlighted a significant disparity between companies' belief in their pricing effectiveness and their ability to implement these strategies. Surveys conducted among senior pricing executives in various sectors demonstrated that despite expressing high confidence in their pricing approaches, a substantial number struggle with actual execution. This indicates a notable gap between perception and reality in the pricing landscape.
news.headline: Zilliant survey shows most companies still using manual pricing despite revenue potential; report finds confidence-strategy gap.

news.summary: Midland-based New Era Helium, Inc. (NEHC) revealed an agreement between its joint venture, Texas Critical Data Centers, LLC, and PowerForward Energy Solutions (PFES) to deliver 250MW of on-site generation capacity. The deal, outlined in a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding, aims to support NEHC's upcoming AI and high-performance computing campus in Ector County, Texas. NEHC, a Nasdaq-listed company, operates as an advanced exploration and production entity within the Permian Basin.
news.headline: New Era Helium (NEHC) partners with PowerForward Energy Solutions to provide 250MW to its AI Data Center in Texas.

news.summary: MiQ, a global programmatic media partner, has unveiled MiQ Sigma, an innovative AI-driven advertising technology designed with a strong foundation in programmatic expertise. The platform harnesses insights from more than 300 varied data sources, encompassing a staggering 700 trillion consumer signals, including TV viewership, web browsing behavior, and in-store purchases. Through advanced AI capabilities, MiQ Sigma promises to revolutionize the advertising landscape.
news.headline: MiQ launches MiQ Sigma, AI-powered platform uniting 300 data feeds, 700 trillion signals, improves programmatic advertising.

news.summary: In Dania Beach, Florida, JetBlue (Nasdaq: JBLU) revealed the rebranding of Paisly, LLC, previously known as JetBlue Travel Products. This transition signifies a key development in JetBlue’s overarching JetForward initiative, with Paisly expanding from an in-house travel tool to a comprehensive, technology-driven managed travel provider. Focused on providing tailored, customer-centric services, Paisly will cater to not just JetBlue clients but also to customers of competing airlines. This move represents JetBlue's commitment to enhancing the travel experience for a wider market.
news.headline: JetBlue Travel Products is now Paisly, focusing on human-first travel. Company aims to serve all airlines, tech-enabled.

news.summary: WOBURN, Mass--SES AI Corporation, a prominent player in AI-enhanced high-performance Li-Metal and Li-ion batteries, shared news that Dr. Qichao Hu, Founder and CEO, is set to join a Fireside Chat at the Deutsche Bank 2025 Global Auto Industry Conference on June 12, 2025, at 2:25 p.m. Eastern Time. Winnie Dong, Research Analyst at Deutsche Bank, will host the live event. SES AI is listed on NYSE as SES and excels in AI battery development. This event showcases the company's commitment to advancing sustainable energy solutions and innovation within the industry.
news.headline: SES AI's CEO to speak at Deutsche Bank 2025 Global Auto Industry Conference on June 12, 2025 at 2:25 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Minneapolis - Donaldson Company, Inc., a global leader in filtration products (NYSE: DCI), revealed that Tod Carpenter, the chairman, president, and CEO, is scheduled to speak at the 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference by William Blair on June 5, 2025, commencing at 10:40 a.m. CT. For individuals interested in tuning in live, a webcast of the event will be available on Donaldson's Investor Relations website under the "Events & Presentations" section.
news.headline: Donaldson Co. (NYSE: DCI) to present at William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 5, 2025, starting at 10:40amCT. Webcast available.

news.summary: Dallas-based infrastructure company AECOM (NYSE: ACM) has secured a contract with the U.S. Air Force Civil Engineer Center (AFCEC) to provide global architecture and engineering services. The contract falls under a multiple award task order agreement and operates within an indefinite delivery, indefinite quantity framework. AECOM will support various environmental projects for the U.S. Air Force, such as restoration, conservation, planning, and environmental quality. This partnership aims to enhance sustainability efforts and improve infrastructure globally.
news.headline: AECOM wins U.S. Air Force contract for global environmental programs, providing services under MATOC for various initiatives.

news.summary: Key stock market levels were reached as Nvidia entered a favorable buying zone. Tesla's CEO Elon Musk strongly criticized the Trump budget, calling it an "abomination." CrowdStrike experienced a late decline. In early trading, Dow Jones Futures showed an increase, with CrowdStrike leading the movers. Overall, the market surpassed resistance levels, according to Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures rise, CrowdStrike leads, market hits key levels with Nvidia in buy zone; Tesla CEO calls Trump budget "abomination." CrowdStrike falls late. (Total characters: 138)

news.summary: A recent study revealed that approximately 37% of American adults have obesity, and the number of cases has been increasing steadily over the past few years. In addition, it was reported that around 10% of children in the U.S. are considered to have severe obesity. These statistics highlight the growing prevalence of obesity in the country and raise concerns about the associated health risks. Experts warn that urgent action is needed to address this public health issue and prevent future complications.
news.headline: YieldMax® ETFs announces distributions on several tickers, including XYZY, WNTR, SMCY, AIYY, MSTY.

news.summary: Genesco Inc., based in Nashville, Tennessee, has recently announced their first quarter results for fiscal year 2026. The company reported that both their top and bottom-line results have surpassed expectations. This positive news indicates strong performance for the company in the beginning of the fiscal year.
news.headline: Genesco Inc. exceeds expectations in Q1 2026 financial report.

news.summary: Wells Fargo has been informed by the Federal Reserve that it is no longer bound by the asset caps that were put in place in 2018. Following this announcement, Wells Fargo's stock experienced a rise and is now within a buy zone for investors. This update on Wells Fargo's asset cap being lifted by the Federal Reserve was reported in Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Wells Fargo's asset cap lifted by Federal Reserve, stock rises in buy zone; restrictions imposed in 2018 removed.

news.headline: NuScale Power opens Energy Exploration Center at George Mason University in Fairfax, VA.

news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH), based in McLean, Virginia, announced the appointment of Ambassador Robert C. O'Brien to its Board of Directors, effective June 9, 2025. O'Brien will join the board to contribute his expertise and experience to the company.
news.headline: Booz Allen Hamilton appoints Amb. Robert C. O’Brien to Board of Directors on June 9, 2025. #NYSE #BAH

news.summary: On June 3, 2025, Ferguson Enterprises Inc. submitted a Form 10-Q to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), available on both the SEC's website at sec.gov and the Company's website at corporate.ferguson.com/investor/financial-information/sec-filings. Ferguson (NYSE: FERG; LSE: FERG), being the biggest value-added distributor catering to specialized professionals, made this financial filing.
news.headline: Ferguson Enterprises Inc. files Form 10-Q with SEC on June 3, 2025. Available on SEC & company website. Largest distributor with ticker FERG on NYSE & LSE.

news.summary: On June 14, 2025, BitMEX will be undergoing planned maintenance from 02:00 to 07:00 UTC. This maintenance will impact all trading services provided by the platform. Following the maintenance period, BitMEX will resume operations in cancel-only mode.
news.headline: BitMEX to halt trading on June 14, 2025, from 02:00 to 07:00 UTC for maintenance. Services will resume in cancel-only mode.

news.summary: The outcomes of the RMB Sovereign Bond tenders conducted on June 4, 2025, have been disclosed by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. These results emphasize the issuance of 2-year RMB bonds by China's Ministry of Finance.
news.headline: HKMA announces results of RMB Sovereign Bond tenders on June 4, 2025, with China issuing 2-year RMB bonds.

news.summary: The recently completed Alts & Meme Trading Arena organized by BitMEX awarded the entire 50,000 USDT prize pool to participants. The competition garnered substantial engagement from users throughout its duration.
news.headline: BitMEX ends Alts & Meme Trading Arena, 50,000 USDT prize pool fully claimed, with high user engagement.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, in London, Finlandia Vodka partnered with SXSW London to hold a special luncheon honoring Dr. Jane Goodall and her Institute. The event highlighted the incredible contributions of the renowned ethologist and conservationist. Attendees gathered to recognize Dr. Goodall's groundbreaking research and ongoing efforts in the field, with discussions revolving around her impactful work. This exclusive celebration brought together a select group of individuals to commemorate Dr. Goodall's accomplishments and commitment to conservation.
news.headline: Finlandia Vodka & SXSW London honor Jane Goodall PhD DBE at exclusive luncheon in London on June 4, 2025.

news.summary: In Amsterdam, Money20/20, a prominent fintech event, has partnered with FXC Intelligence, a leading provider of cross-border payments data, to release their joint report "How Will Europe’s Money Move in the Future? 2025’s View of 2035." This report was unveiled at Money20/20 Europe in Amsterdam and offers insights into the future of Europe's cross-border payments sector through data-driven analysis. The collaboration between the two entities aims to shed light on the transformative changes expected in Europe's cross-border payments landscape.
news.headline: Money20/20 and FXC Intelligence released a report on the future of European cross-border payments at Money20/20 Europe in Amsterdam.

news.summary: A recent heart imaging study conducted at Queen Mary University of London (QMUL) and Barts Health NHS Trust assessed the effectiveness of Research Grid's AI technology. The study revealed significant cost savings of $1.5 million due to reduced manual data entry, alongside a notable decrease in the human error rate by 5%. Additionally, the AI system automated more than 24,000 staff hours, streamlining operations within the healthcare facilities.
news.headline: Research Grid's AI automates 3-year Queen Mary clinical trial in seconds, saving $1.5M, cutting 5% error rate, and 24K staff hours.

news.summary: In April, job openings surpassed expectations, reaching 7.391 million compared to 7.200 million in March. This data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) suggests businesses may be moving beyond tariff concerns. However, the BLS noted the change as "little changed," leading analysts to question its impact on the stock market. The Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey (JOLTS) showed a favorable outcome in April, exceeding the projected 7.100 million job openings. Chris Zaccarelli, Northlight Asset Management's CIO, viewed this growth positively, indicating a healthy economy as fears of tariff impacts on businesses ease. Zaccarelli highlighted business confidence in hiring and expansion despite prevailing uncertainties. Amid concerns, the data indicates a shift in focus from tariffs, pointing towards economic resilience.
news.headline: April job openings rose to 7.391M from 7.2M in March, beating forecast of 7.1M. Data suggests businesses are moving past tariff concerns.

news.summary: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) announced its financial outcomes for the first quarter ending on May 3, 2025. CEO Mike Creedon stated that the company's positive first-quarter results reflect advancements in strategic goals and customer satisfaction with recent alterations. Creedon expressed confidence in the company's ability to thrive during economic challenges, citing past resilience. The financial report highlights a successful quarter for Dollar Tree, indicating progress and adaptation.
news.headline: Dollar Tree reports Q1 results for fiscal 2025 with positive progress; CEO says customers are responding well.

news.summary: Maxar Intelligence, a top provider of accurate geospatial insights, has revealed a new partnership with Saab to collaborate on cutting-edge multi-domain battlespace solutions. Their focus will be on developing advanced space-based C5ISR systems for the digital battlefield, emphasizing GPS resilience for autonomous drone systems. This partnership aims to enhance military technology for improved command, control, communications, computers, cyber capabilities, intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance.
news.headline: Maxar and Saab partner to create advanced space solutions for digital battlefield, focusing on GPS resilience.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 4, 2025, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTCQB: NKGFF) shared an updated Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) for its Atlanta Gold Mine Project. The project spans 12,000 hectares (120km2) and is wholly owned by Nevada King. The company expressed satisfaction with the updated estimate for the project situated in a productive region.
news.headline: Nevada King Gold Corp. doubles M&I resource at Atlanta to 1,019,600 gold ounces averaging 1.14 g/t.

The European Commission on Wednesday announced 13 new raw material projects outside the bloc to increase its supplies of metals and minerals essential for it to stay competitive in the energy transition as well as defence and aerospace.
